leadText: The Canyon Biome (Japanese: キャニオンエリア Canyon Area) is a large biome within the Terarium, located in the Unova region's Blueberry Academy.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The canyon biome has vast mountains with waterfalls surrounding them, steep cliffs with lush plateaus, and deep caverns and caves underneath. Plenty of electric and rock-type Pokemon can be found in Chargestone Cavern .

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Contents 1 Places of interest 1.1 Canyon Plaza 1.2 Canyon Outdoor Classroom 1.3 Canyon Rest Area 1.4 Chargestone Cavern Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Canyon Plaza [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Canyon Plaza The Canyon Plaza is located in the southwestern portion of the biome. The player can challenge Amarys of the BB League here. Canyon Outdoor Classroom [ edit | edit source ] Located south of the Canyon Plaza, the outdoor classroom becomes a stop for Flying Taxis once visited. Canyon Rest Area [ edit | edit source ] A rest area is located north of the Canyon Plaza, near the border to the Polar Biome . A guidance counselor is found here, who will reward the player for defeating Trainers in the Canyon Biome. The player can heal their Pokémon here and purchase items from vending machines .
